title: BulkRevokeResponse
description: Response from POST /v2/permits:bulk-revoke. Returns a summary of the revocation operation. An empty run (no active permits found for the run_id) is NOT an error — revoked_count will be 0. This handles the common case where permits have already expired or been consumed before the revoke signal fires.

revoked_count.description: Number of permits revoked. Zero if no active permits were found for the given run_id (not an error).

workflow_id.description: Echo of the workflow_id from the request. Present for correlation — callers matching async revoke results can key on this.

run_id.description: Echo of the run_id from the request.
